purpose: Block root entries outside the allowed shape unless a hold reason exists.

rows.trigger: A root entry is not ORGANS, SUPPORT, or an explicit HOLD_WITH_REASON item.
rows.required_action: Move the item or record a hold reason in the migration address book.

rows.trigger: A moved quarantine or learning archive item is used as an active source.
rows.required_action: Remove active dependency or create an explicit salvage request.

rows.trigger: Final response claims full clean while allowlist checker has holds or warnings.
rows.required_action: Downgrade to PASS_WITH_WARNINGS and list holds.
